title: Chapter 5
content:
Chapter 5: The Anal Semen Fountain, Accompanied by Vulgar Sounds

I had only just lost my virginity in the female knight’s asshole a few moments ago, and I had cum from a single thrust, so my experience points were practically zero.

Even though I wanted to make her stop using Appraisal, the female knight’s hand was gently stimulating my cock, so I couldn’t put any strength in my hips and couldn’t resist.

She was completely misunderstanding my erect dick as some kind of item and kept pulling on it. At the same time, she seemed hesitant to roughly take someone else’s possession, so she would occasionally weaken her grip and give me probing, teasing strokes.

Auh... Uuh... This is basically a handjob, isn’t it...?

It feels completely different from when I do it myself!

Haaau... The head of my cock fits perfectly between her fingers.

She loosens her grip, and her hand slides. Then her index, middle, ring, and pinky fingers stroke the underside of my glans one after another.

"Hyauuu!"

I let out a pathetic voice and pulled my hips back. The stimulation through the shirt was neither too strong nor too weak — it was gently tormenting my post-ejaculation cock.

"I’m still in the middle of using Appraisal. Stay still."

The female knight reached for my crotch again. Her fingertips were slightly off target, and the tip of her nail scraped right across the slit at the center of my glans.

"Hiuu! Fuuu!"

I stood on my tiptoes while letting out the weirdest sound of my life.

A yellow electric shock ran through my brain and my thoughts nearly short-circuited. Taking advantage of that moment, she grabbed my shaft again. Thank god it wasn’t the slit... I even felt relieved that she hadn’t attacked the urethra directly. This is dangerous — did I just get trained in a single instant?

Her hand felt so good that I was going to cum again very soon if this continued.

"The Appraisal result is out!"

"I-I’m about to cum...!"

"It’s already out!"

"I’m about to... cum...!"

If the skill is finished, please let go of my dick already...

"...? Some information is unclear because you moved, but here is the result. Um... It says it’s a mythical-grade item that was bathed in Dragon God’s liquid and tempered by internal pressure

...!"

I see. So my penis had been forged into a mythical-grade item by Lucia’s love juices and the pressure inside her vagina.

No — more importantly, please let go of it already.

The female knight seemed excited by the Appraisal result and was gripping me harder.

This is bad. By pure coincidence, her current grip strength is exactly the same as my finishing masturbation grip!

If this keeps up, I’m really going to cum.

"What kind of item is this exactly? Show it to me!"

"W-wait—!"

Before I could stop her, the female knight lifted up my shirt. Since I was wearing something like a big t-shirt with no pants or underwear underneath, it was basically the same as having my skirt flipped up while going commando.

The moment she suddenly released my cock, the feeling of liberation pushed my glans against the inside of the shirt, bringing me to the edge. On top of that, the excitement of having my erection seen up close by the opposite sex delivered the final blow.

Semen raced through my urethra with the force of the Seikan Tunnel opening.

"Ugh...!"

Byurururu!

A huge load of white fluid — about the volume of an entire Yakult bottle — splattered across the female knight’s face.

It happened right when she leaned in close to my crotch and said "Show it to me," so a lot of it went straight into her mouth, which was shaped like the syllable "re."

I had just ejaculated enough to overflow from her rectum, yet I still had this much left?

Gulp.

I heard the sound of her swallowing.

"I swallowed it reflexively... What is this exactly?"

"S-sorry..."

Even though it was unavoidable, I had just given a facial to a girl I met for the first time.

And she swallowed it.

The female knight slowly used her finger to scoop up the white fluid stuck to her cheek.

"It’s bitter, but somehow addictive. Also...

sniff sniff

... It has a strange scent."

"D-don’t smell it...!"

So it’s an addictive taste!?

"Appraisal...!"

"Stop!"

What if it says something horrible like "infertile" or "watery liquid from over-ejaculation"!?

"This is...!"

The female knight stood up energetically. I instinctively flinched and leaned back.

Her eyes were sparkling like stars.

"Elixir! The spiritual medicine that can cure any illness or injury...!"

"...Huh?"

"I couldn’t see it clearly. Where on earth did you get so much Elixir from just now!?"

"S-stop!"

She tried to lift my shirt again, so this time I properly blocked her. Even though I was feeling weak right after ejaculating, I desperately grabbed both of her wrists.

I admit I’m at fault here, but there are some things I have to say.

"You’re a girl, right!? Read the room! Don’t you have any shame!?"

Even though she seemed mature, she was probably only high-school age at most — likely younger than me. I decided to scold her quite firmly.

It worked instantly.

"...Hah! M-my apologies! To think I would act this way toward my savior!"

The female knight hurriedly knelt before me.

Her posture looked noble, like a knight paying respects to her king.

However—

Jubu... Buchuuchuuchuu...

White fluid overflowed from her asshole with wet, obscene sounds. The sudden change in posture must have put pressure on her rectum. Even after that massive anal fountain earlier, there was still this much semen left inside her intestines? In erotic videos, the amount that overflows from the ass looks like milk, but had I really ejaculated over a liter?

"Ah... Ah? W-why...!?"

The female knight didn’t seem to understand what had happened to her body.

That’s right. Earlier she had been on the verge of death, her senses dulled and her mind hazy. She had climaxed from anal sex in that state, so she had no memory or sensation of the anal fountain or her incontinence.

"T-this is... n-no... I-I...!"

Juuuuuuv...

Even while she was making excuses, the lewd sound continued, drawing out strings of fluid.

The female knight’s face turned bright red as she panicked. Of course she would. She had suddenly let out vulgar sounds and sprayed sticky fluid from her ass right in front of a man she had just met. It was only natural to feel embarrassed.

"Ugh... Just kill me..."

There it is! The classic "kill me" line!

This is it. This is exactly what a female knight is like!

Ugh... Seeing the embarrassed female knight made me hard again. What’s wrong with my dick? It’s way too energetic. Is this the power of the Sex Warrior skill?

More importantly, since I’m completely at fault here, I should pretend I didn’t notice anything.

I was about to ask her for information I’d need to survive in this other world when I realized something. Even though we had anal sex, I still didn’t know the female knight’s name.

"Huh? Is something wrong?"

"Eh?"

"I heard a strange sound. Did you step on an orc corpse or something?"

"...Y-yes! That’s right! When I stepped on an orc corpse, its internal organs got crushed and made a weird noise!"

The female knight stood up straight, spine rigid. She stood tall as if to say there was nothing shameful about her.

"Now that I think about it, we haven’t introduced ourselves yet. My name is Masaharu Ooi."

"I am Ilia. Ilia Nawayol, ruler of the Margland territory."

Margland?

I remembered that when she was dying, Ilia had taken something out and said "Deliver this to Margland Castle." I had remembered it because it might have been her last will. I think it was a pendant, but I had left it on the ground.

It should be right nearby.

"Ah..."

"...Eh?"

The pendant was sitting in a puddle of white fluid. Ilia followed my gaze and noticed it too.

"M-Mother’s memento...!"

Ilia picked up the pendant and wiped the semen off with her hand.

"Ugh...! What on earth is this liquid...? Skill Appraisal."

"Ah..."

If she appraises it, everything will be exposed!

"Elixir? Why is there so much Elixir!? And it came from my... my..."

She couldn’t bring herself to say "ass."

Oh well. I’ll mix in some fake information and confess partially.

"Um... You had lost consciousness, so I administered the Elixir through your butt as treatment."

"Eh? W-why would you put Elixir in my butt...?"

"It’s called a suppository. Some medicines are more effective when inserted anally. It seems I gave you too much, so it overflowed. I’m sorry. It was a medical error."

"I-is that so...? I thought I had committed some disgraceful act..."

"It was a medical procedure. There’s nothing to be embarrassed about."

"I-I see... To save my life, you used such a precious and large amount of Elixir... How can I ever repay you...?"

She looked so proper and dignified, yet her asshole area was probably still sticky with semen.

Just imagining her feelings was enough to make me hard again, so I tried not to think about it.

"I should be the one thanking you, actually..."

"Eh?"

"No, never mind. I only did what any decent person would do."

No matter the process, I really had saved Ilia’s life, so let’s call it even.

Besides, I only thrust once and came, so it wasn’t really anal sex — it was just administering medicine. I have nothing to feel guilty about, right?

"You’re very kind... Ooi Masaharu..."

"Ah, just call me Masaharu."

"Y-yes."

Kuuu... Being called by my first name by a girl around my age... I think the last time was in kindergarten?

"Masaharu. Please come to my castle. Allow me to repay you properly."

"With pleasure!"

Yes!

I’ve secured food and a place to sleep. I’ll probably get information about the area too.

Looks like I’ve avoided dying in a ditch on my first day in another world.

Maybe I can negotiate to become Ilia’s personal doctor, providing Elixir sperm in exchange for living as a neet in the castle. She seems really grateful, so I’ll wait for the right moment to ask.

Aim for the isekai NEET sex life!
